description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker image with a docker:stable-dind service, and define CI, COMPOSE_FILE, GENERATE_REPORT, and RAILS_ENV variables. Add a before_script that copies config/database.yml.example to config/database.yml, copies db/schema.rb.example to db/schema.rb, installs py-pip via apk and then installs docker-compose with pip, runs docker-compose build and docker-compose up -d, and executes docker-compose exec -T web rake db:setup followed by docker-compose exec -T web rake db:migrate. Define a single job named job (default stage) that runs docker-compose exec -T web rake test:all and docker-compose exec -T web rails test -d. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are specified.
